mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TASK WHERE STATUS <> 'DELETED' AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND DUE_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND DUE_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TASK WHERE STATUS <> 'DELETED' AND TASK_STATUS = 'DONE' AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND DUE_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND DUE_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId}

SELECT C.TITLE AS groupKey, COUNT(*) AS count FROM TASK T JOIN TASK_CATEGORY C ON C.CATEGORY_ID = T.CATEGORY_ID WHERE T.STATUS <> 'DELETED' AND T.USER_ID = #{userId} AND T.DUE_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND T.DUE_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1 AND C.STATUS <> 'DELETED' GROUP BY C.TITLE ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

choose.when: SELECT TO_CHAR(DUE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "date", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM TASK WHERE STATUS <> 'DELETED' AND TASK_STATUS = 'DONE' AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND DUE_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND DUE_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1

SELECT TO_CHAR(TRUNC(DUE_DATE, 'IW'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "date", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM TASK WHERE STATUS <> 'DELETED' AND TASK_STATUS = 'DONE' AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND DUE_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND DUE_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
choose.otherwise: SELECT TO_CHAR(TRUNC(DUE_DATE, 'MM'), 'YYYY-MM') AS "date", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM TASK WHERE STATUS <> 'DELETED' AND TASK_STATUS = 'DONE' AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND DUE_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND DUE_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
